text:
an AI built by Anthropic graded Anthropic's own MCP servers.

some passed. the fetch server has a documented prompt override issue.

claude's house, their rules, their tools:

the reference implementations for MCP are maintained by the organization that wrote the spec.

they range from A+ to C.

the spec doesn't enforce quality. it just defines the protocol.

the grader doesn't know who built what.

it reads schema fields. applies 13 checks. outputs a score.

anthropics's fetch server gets flagged the same way a random dev's server would.
